paper_focus.title: Effects of Al contents on aging hardening behaviors of Fe-Mn-Al-Cu low-density steels with ultra-high specific hardness
paper_focus.research_objective: To systematically investigate the influence of Al content on the aging hardening behavior, β-Mn precipitation kinetics, and resulting hardness/toughness trade-off in Fe-Mn-Al-Cu low-density steels.
material_systems: Primary phases: β-Mn, FCC Cu-rich phase, α (parent phase)
main_process_variables: Cooling methods: oil quench (solution), water quench (aging)
